title: Living System Project
definition: A self-perpetuating knowledge ecosystem designed to embody and explore the principles of complexity, evolution, and emergence.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The project is like a living organism that grows, learns, and evolves just like the systems it studies. It's not just a tool, but a part of the system itself.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A self-organizing network of scientists, AI, and data that adapts and evolves based on environmental pressures and random variation to study complex adaptive systems.
difficulty_levels.expert: The project embodies the principles it seeks to understand by becoming a living, emergent, and adaptive system that mirrors the complexity of the real-world systems it studies. It's a grand experiment on self-organization and emergence within a networked intelligence.

extra_fields.insight: The project must evolve like the very systems it studies, becoming a living mirror of life's complexity.
